description: 45 - 10-10-2024 - Email from Peter Mandelson (whilst at Global Counsel) to Darren Jones (former Chief Secretary to the Treasul
text:
Jones (former Chief Secretary to the Treasul

From: Peter Mandelson Personal
Date: 10 October 2024 at 09:45:32 BST
To: Darren Jones Personal

Subject: High investment economy

Dear Darren,

In the lead up to the government's investment summit and the Budget, | am attaching a lecture
| am delivering in Edinburgh today which makes the case for prioritising investment over
consumption, creating a ‘growth conscience’ in everything the government does and using
industrial strategy as a transmission belt between the UK's world class, research intensive
universities and the rest of the economy.

| hope you find it interesting.

Very best

Peter

Lord Mandelson

Chairman

A: Personal
Te Personal

E: Personal

www.global-counsel.com
Personal

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
